Section heading: Our use of cookies

**Session 2022-23**

Section heading: Our use of cookies

**Session 2022-23**

chunks.text:
Section heading: Online Safety Bill

**Written evidence submitted by Neil Kendall (OSB02)**

**Online Harms Bill Consultation**

To whom it may concern,

I am writing to you today to respond to the Online Harms Bill.

I note that you state that one of this bills policy objectives is to preserve and enhance free speech online however it is clearly going to do the opposite.

*May 2022*

We also received similar submissions from the following individuals:

• Sharon Harris
• Brian Douglas
• Matthew Lamonte
